chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/343)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/343)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي قَدْ كَبِرَتْ سِنِّي وَ دَقَّ عَظْمِي وَ إِنِّي سَأَلْتُ أَبَاكَ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَخْبَرَنِي بِكَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي مَنْ بَعْدَكَ فَقَالَ هَذَا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn Al Luluie, frm Yahya Bin Amro, from Dawood Al Raqqy who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I have aged a lot and my bones are knocking, and I asked your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> informed me of you<sup>asws</sup>, therefore inform me of the one<sup>asws</sup> after you<sup>asws</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This, Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn al-Lu’lu’i from Yahya ibn ‘Amr from Dawud al-Raqqi who has said the following. “I said to abu al-Hassan aMusa (a.s.), ‘I have grown old and my bones are weakening. I asked your father (a.s.) and he informed me about you. Would you also inform me (about the Imam after you).” The Imam (a.s.) said, “This abu al-Hassan al-Rida.”
